# CaseLink

> A secure referral and collaboration network for general dentists and specialists. HIPAA compliant by design.

CaseLink is a marketing site at https://www.caselink.net. The product itself lives at https://app.caselink.net.

CaseLink is built around one belief: the relationships that already exist between dental practices deserve infrastructure that respects them. The patient deserves continuity. The practice deserves growth, not friction.

## What CaseLink does

- General dentists send patient referrals to specialists in under three minutes.
- Specialists receive cases with full clinical context attached (patient details, x-rays, insurance).
- Both sides see status updates and outcome reports without phone tag or fax.
- Encrypted messaging is organized by patient and by practice.
- Practice owners track conversion, response time, and revenue impact.

## Who it is for

- General dentists who want full visibility into every referral they send.
- Specialists (orthodontics, endodontics, periodontics, oral surgery, prosthodontics) who want pre-filled clinical context with each incoming case.
- Office managers who coordinate referral flow across a practice.

## Pricing

- General dentist plan: free, unlimited referrals, secure file sharing, HIPAA compliance, real-time updates.
- Specialist plan: $299/month (or $269/month on yearly billing, saving $358 per year). Adds referral inbox, analytics dashboard, case timelines.
- DSO and multi-location: custom pricing with team permissions, API access, dedicated success manager.

All plans include HIPAA compliance, BAA on signup, and unlimited case storage.

## Compliance and security

- End-to-end encryption: every referral, every message, every file encrypted in transit and at rest.
- Audit logs for every action: every login, every change, every download timestamped and traceable.
- Role-based access with automatic session timeouts.
- Designed for dental privacy from day one. HIPAA built into the foundation, not retrofitted.

## Founder

CaseLink was founded by Nick Campbell, Co-Founder and CEO. CaseLink, Inc. is headquartered at 124 S Wise St, Arlington, VA 22204, in the Washington, DC metro area. The company began with a simple observation: dentists are some of the most connected professionals in healthcare, yet the digital tools connecting their practices have not caught up.

## Resources

Guides on dental referrals, conversion benchmarks, HIPAA-compliant collaboration, and running a connected practice. From the CaseLink team.

- FHIR is coming to dental authorization workflows (CMS-0062-P explained): https://www.caselink.net/resources/cms-0062-p-fhir-dental-authorization
- How to stop losing dental referrals to specialists: https://www.caselink.net/resources/how-to-stop-losing-dental-referrals
- Free dental referral software for general dentists: https://www.caselink.net/resources/free-dental-referral-software-for-general-dentists
- What a healthy dental referral conversion rate actually looks like: https://www.caselink.net/resources/dental-referral-conversion-rate-benchmarks
- How endodontists track and manage incoming referrals: https://www.caselink.net/resources/how-endodontists-track-and-manage-incoming-referrals

## Industry context

- Around 30% of dental referrals never reach treatment. Patients drop off between the general practitioner and the specialist, often without either side knowing.
- Fewer than 2% of US dental practices use a tool built specifically for referrals. In dentistry, the category is still wide open.
- Outcome reports between dental practices typically take days, not minutes, because they still travel by fax or phone.
